{{Quote|While I regret that it had to turn violent, my guards acted per orders and are to be commended. We have a responsibility to the representatives of the Republic. We have hundreds of delegates arriving in the coming days, and we have to make sure they are safe, and to do so, we have to clear those entryways.|Jesra Loture|<ref name="HNN 55">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|55|news/1359_1.html|Anti-War Rally Dispersed by Senate Guard}}</ref>}}
'''Jesra Loture''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] who served as [[Captain of the Guard/Legends|Captain of the Guard]] (and commander of the [[Senate Guard/Legends|Senate Guard]]) of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]] and the start of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Biography==
In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], Jesra was among the [[Senate Guard/Legends|Senate Guards]] who prevent a crowd of protesters from moving into the [[Senate Building/Legends|Senate Building]] during the establishment of creating a [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]]. In order to ensure the safety of the delegates and [[Senator/Legends|senators]], Jesra decided to proceed with force against the demonstrators.
